title: Our Vines Have Tender Grapes
overview: Welcome to Fuller Junction, Wisconsin, a friendly small town settled by Norwegian farmers.  Here we see the exploits of two young cousins, Selma and Arnold, who learn about their world and experience the ups and downs of life as the season pass.
